text:
Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
Build your startup faster with free access to:
→ Up to $150k of Azure credits and discounts on 30+ tools your team needs to build, like GitHub, Microsoft 365, LinkedIn Premium, and more.
→ Credits toward Azure AI Studio—the most comprehensive set of AI models, including OpenAI GPT-3.5 Turbo, GPT-4, and Llama 2 by Meta.
→ 1:1 sessions with Microsoft experts to help you work through technical and business challenges.
Apply in minutes at https://aka.ms/apply-fh
